auth.signUpSubtitle: Everything SightLab publishes is free to read — no account needed. An account gets you the Telegram channel invite link.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.

errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.signupFailed: Could not create the account. Try again.
errors.callbackFailed: That confirmation link is invalid or expired.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Your delivery preferences and sign-in.
account.emailOptInBody: Get the full §6/§7 market dispatch in your inbox after each run. Market-wide only — never your holdings.
account.emailOptInOn: On — you'll receive the daily dispatch by email.
account.emailOptInOff: Off — turn on to receive the daily dispatch by email.
account.telegramBody: Join the invite-only channel for the daily dispatch. Joins are moderated manually.
account.portalError: Could not open billing. Try again.

landing.standfirst: A deterministic daily read on where the cycle stands — fund flows across sectors and a Weinstein-stage positioning call, delivered every morning before the open. Open research, free to read.
landing.sampleHeadline: Tech accumulates while energy bleeds — cycle holds at Stage 3
landing.sampleDeck: Rotation is concentrating into a single leadership lane. That narrowing is the tell, not the breakout.
landing.sampleBody: The composite read is unchanged week over week: a mid-to-late expansion that rewards trend but punishes chasing. Sector dispersion is widening — a handful of names carry the tape while the breadth underneath thins. We treat this as a confirmer of the regime already in place, not a prediction of the next one.
landing.glanceNote: Open research, free. The full §6 flow table and §7 cycle breakdown are public — for everyone.
landing.ctaBody: The full daily dispatch, the weekly fund-flow table, and the complete archive are open and free. Contributions welcome.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.standfirst: One subscription. The full dispatch, the flow table, the cycle breakdown, and the archive.
pricing.deliveryNote: Dispatches target 00:00 UTC. Occasional delays happen — a late day is a known property, not a broken promise.
pricing.checkoutError: Could not start checkout. Try again.

paper.gateBody: How SightLab reads the cycle — §6 fund-flow accumulation/distribution, §7 Weinstein staging with the 30-week SMA and sector dispersion, and the confirmer-not-predictor framing. Free to read with an account.

dispatch.staleBanner: Today's edition hasn't arrived yet — showing the {date} dispatch.

archive.title: Dispatch archive
archive.emptyBody: The first edition lands after the next scheduled run.

footer.disclaimer: SightLab is research, not investment advice. The cycle read is a confirmer, not a predictor.
